mapper.sql: homepage_id, reception_idx, reception_name, reception_phone, add_id, add_date, mod_id, mod_date
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM SMS_RECEPTION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY reception_idx DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SMS_RECEPTION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(reception_idx), 0) + 1 FROM SMS_RECEPTION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO SMS_RECEPTION ( homepage_id, reception_idx, reception_name, reception_phone, add_id, add_date ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{reception_idx}, #{reception_name}, #{reception_phone}, #{add_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE SMS_RECEPTION SET reception_name = #{reception_name}, reception_phone = #{reception_phone}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND reception_idx = #{reception_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(work_idx), 0) + 1 FROM RECEPTION_WORK WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND reception_idx = #{reception_idx}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RECEPTION_WORK a USING DUAL ON (homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND reception_idx = #{reception_idx} AND work_idx = #{work_idx}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET work_code = #{work_code}, reception_yn = #{reception_yn} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, reception_idx, work_idx, work_code, reception_yn ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{reception_idx}, #{work_idx}, #{work_code}, #{reception_yn} )
mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, reception_idx, work_idx, work_code, reception_yn FROM RECEPTION_WORK WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND reception_idx = #{reception_idx}

SELECT a.homepage_id, a.reception_idx, a.reception_name, a.reception_phone, b.work_idx, b.work_code, b.reception_yn FROM SMS_RECEPTION a, RECEPTION_WORK b WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.reception_idx = b.reception_idx AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND work_code = #{work_code} AND reception_yn = 'Y'
